description: Growth-oriented Union Budget with capex and sectoral support.

required_inputs.label: Were there consumption / rural relief measures?

situation_template: The Union Budget has delivered a {budget_tone} stance with {capex_growth_percent}% capex growth and a fiscal deficit target of {fiscal_deficit_percent}%. {market_reaction_text} The spending profile is viewed as {capex_growth_bucket} for infrastructure and capital goods. {defence_text}{consumption_text}{fiscal_balance_text}
round_events: Round 1 (0-2 hours): Infrastructure, capital goods, defence, and PSU-linked names see immediate attention as sell-side desks publish first-cut notes.
Round 2 (2-12 hours): Fund managers compare the growth impulse versus fiscal discipline, and sector rotation begins across budget-linked names.
Round 3 (12-72 hours): Street focus shifts to execution credibility, tender flow, fiscal arithmetic, and whether the rally broadens or narrows.
default_actions: track follow-through in PSU and defence names
